# 👋 Contributors Welcome — Here's What We Need

Thanks for your interest in Memoria! This is a pinned issue to help you find your first contribution quickly.

Memoria is a **free, offline CLI** that cuts AI coding costs by 60-80% by giving agents a compact memory of your project. We're early-stage (v0.1.0) and actively welcoming contributors of all levels.

---

## 🟢 Good First Issues (No deep internals knowledge needed)

| # | Task | Skills needed | Effort |
|---|------|--------------|--------|
| 1 | [Add tests for a CLI command](link-to-issue) | TypeScript, Vitest | ~2 hours |
| 2 | [Improve error messages](link-to-issue) | TypeScript | ~1 hour |
| 3 | [Add `--json` flag to `memoria savings`](link-to-issue) | TypeScript, commander | ~2 hours |
| 4 | [Write a new USE_CASES scenario (docs only)](link-to-issue) | Writing, markdown | ~30 min |
| 5 | [Add `--dry-run` to `memoria ingest`](link-to-issue) | TypeScript | ~3 hours |

> Replace `link-to-issue` with the actual GitHub issue URLs after creating them.

---

## 🟡 Help Wanted (Some familiarity with the codebase helpful)

- **VS Code extension** — a lightweight extension that runs `memoria recall` and inserts context into the editor
- **Shell completions** — bash/zsh tab-completion for `memoria` commands and flags
- **`memoria ingest` watch mode** — auto-re-index on file save (`--watch` flag)
- **GitHub Action** — a reusable action that runs `memoria ingest` in CI and caches `.memoria/`

---

## 🔵 Documentation & Community

- Add your language/framework to USE_CASES.md (Python, Go, Rust, monorepos, notebooks...)
- Translate the README to another language
- Record a demo GIF or video walkthrough
- Write a blog post or tutorial about Memoria

---

## 📋 Before You Start

1. Read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) — setup takes under 5 minutes
2. Comment on the issue you want to work on so we can assign it to you
3. Open a draft PR early — we give feedback quickly

## 💬 Questions?

Open a [Discussion](https://github.com/GergesBernaba1/Memoria/discussions) or ask in the issue thread. We're happy to help you get started.

---

*Star the repo ⭐ if Memoria saves you money — it helps more developers find it!*
